# CDE/PII Tagging: raw-ingest-bea-rpp

**Table:** `bronze.bea_rpp` (Iceberg: `raw.bea_rpp`)
**Spec:** `docs/specs/raw-ingest-bea-rpp.md`
**Date:** 2026-04-10
**Agent:** @cde-tagger
**Zone:** Bronze (raw ingest)
**Contract:** `governance/data-contracts/raw-bea-rpp.yaml` *(to be generated by @doc-generator — embed the flags below)*

---

## Domain Context Referenced

- `governance/domain-context.md` — BEA Regional Price Parities section (added 2026-04-10)
- `governance/pii-scans/raw-ingest-bea-rpp.md` — PII scan decision: **NO PII**, k-anonymity floor ~584,000, every row is a state-level aggregate, zero personal data
- `governance/eda/raw-bea-rpp-eda.md` — 51 rows (50 states + DC), 8 columns, single-year snapshot (`data_year=2024`), single batch timestamp
- **Concept Mapping Guidance (domain-context.md §BEA RPP):** explicitly instructs @cde-tagger to auto-approve `rpp_all_items`, `geo_fips`, and `geo_name` as CDEs, tied to BT-098 (Regional Price Parity) and the BEA external standard
- **Applicable regulations:** NONE — BEA RPP is U.S. Government-published aggregate economic statistics in the public domain. No HIPAA, FERPA, GLBA, SOX, GDPR, CCPA, or PCI DSS exposure
- **PII expectations:** NONE — all 8 columns are non-personal (geography, macroeconomic index, or pipeline metadata)

---

## Table Context: Why CDE Decisions Matter Here

`bronze.bea_rpp` is a **51-row reference table** (50 states + DC, one row per state). It is tiny in volume but load-bearing in function: every Silver and Gold derivation — `state_abbr`, `census_region`, `purchasing_power_multiplier`, `cost_tier`, `adjusted_30k/50k/75k/100k` — and every MCP tool response and every frontend salary display downstream is a deterministic transformation of the three business columns in this table. A single wrong value in `rpp_all_items` silently misleads every user who selects that state. A single wrong value in `geo_fips` breaks the join to the student's state selection. A wrong `data_year` silently stales every purchasing-power figure in the product. The CDE flags below reflect that load-bearing role.

Per Brightsmith governance policy, CDE flags do **not** propagate across zones — this tagging covers only Bronze columns. Silver and Gold tagging will happen on their own contracts.

---

## Columns Flagged as CDE

| # | Column | Type | is_cde | Rationale |
|---|--------|------|--------|-----------|
| 1 | `geo_fips` | string | **true** | Primary key and **the sole join key** for every downstream use of this table. The student's state selection (from the frontend or MCP tool) resolves to a `state_fips` that joins back to this column through Silver and Gold. No other column can substitute as the join key — `geo_name` is display-only and `rpp_all_items` is not unique (Iowa and Oklahoma tie at 87.8). Also the dedup grain for the Bronze→Silver promote. Domain-context.md §BEA RPP explicitly auto-approves this as CDE. ANSI/FIPS external standard. |
| 2 | `geo_name` | string | **true** | Full human-readable state name. Flagged as CDE because it is the **display label** served by the MCP tool response and the frontend salary adjustment UI (e.g., "In California, that's equivalent to about $58,700 in purchasing power"). It is also the fallback identifier when a user or LLM passes a state by name rather than FIPS code or abbreviation. Without it, Gemma cannot produce the user-facing narrative. Domain-context.md §BEA RPP explicitly auto-approves this as CDE. |
| 3 | `rpp_all_items` | double | **true** | **The entire analytical payload of this table.** Every derived field in Silver (`purchasing_power_multiplier`) and Gold (`cost_tier`, `adjusted_30k/50k/75k/100k`) is a pure function of this one column. Every salary adjustment displayed to students — in Stage 2 Reveal, the Branch Tree, the Compare screen, and the stretch-goal Fight Location Lock boss — is `national_salary × (100 / rpp_all_items)`. If this column is wrong for a state, **every salary figure displayed to any student who selects that state is wrong**. BT-098 (Regional Price Parity). Domain-context.md §BEA RPP explicitly auto-approves this as CDE. **Highest-criticality column in the table.** |
| 4 | `data_year` | int | **true** | Provenance-critical temporal dimension. The RPP index is re-published annually by BEA, and values shift year-over-year as the underlying price index methodology updates. A row labeled with the wrong `data_year` silently misrepresents the vintage of every downstream purchasing-power figure. Also guards against stale-refresh bugs (the DQ rule `data_year = 2024` is a P0 — see spec) and governs when the next annual refresh overwrites the table. Because the EDA notes 43 of 51 rows are currently *estimated* placeholder values (pending live BEA API load), `data_year` is the field that tells a future refresh "these rows are the 2024 vintage and may be replaced on next load." Critical for correctness of all derived values. |

**Total CDE flags:** 4 of 8 columns.

---

## Columns Flagged as PII

**None.** All 8 columns are non-PII. Per `governance/pii-scans/raw-ingest-bea-rpp.md`:

- State FIPS codes and state names are public jurisdiction identifiers, categorically non-PII under HIPAA Safe Harbor §164.514(b)(2)(i)(B) (geographic units of first-three-ZIP-digits-or-larger are safe; a state is far larger).
- `rpp_all_items` is a macroeconomic aggregate (price index), not an individual measurement.
- `data_year`, `ingested_at`, `load_date` are pipeline / publication timing, not personal dates.
- `source_url`, `source_method` are operational provenance metadata.
- k-anonymity floor of the table is ~584,000 (smallest state population, Wyoming) — every row represents hundreds of thousands to tens of millions of people in aggregate.

No column receives `is_pii: true`. No sensitivity classification above `public` is required. No RLS, no column masking, no encryption-beyond-baseline.

---

## Columns Evaluated — Not Flagged

| # | Column | Type | is_cde | is_pii | Reason Not Critical / Not Sensitive |
|---|--------|------|--------|--------|-------------------------------------|
| 5 | `source_url` | string | false | false | Pipeline provenance metadata — identifies the BEA API endpoint or the local CSV cache path the row came from. Not consumed by any downstream business logic, MCP tool, or user-facing display. Lineage captures provenance at a better granularity (`governance/lineage/`). **Secrets-hygiene note from the PII scan:** the ingestor must not persist the substituted `UserID=<API_KEY>` query parameter into this column; this is a secrets-hygiene guardrail, not a CDE concern. |
| 6 | `ingested_at` | timestamp | false | false | ETL batch timestamp. Identical across all 51 rows in a single load (batch stamp, not event time). Useful for freshness tracking but not a decision input to any downstream product. Freshness is governed by the annual refresh cadence, not a per-row timestamp. |
| 7 | `source_method` | string | false | false | Enum (`bea_api` / `csv_cache`) identifying whether the row came from the live BEA API or the fallback CSV. Operational provenance only. The domain context notes the current load is 100% `csv_cache`; the DQ rule must be `IN ('bea_api','csv_cache')`. Not consumed by downstream business logic or user-facing display. *Could be re-considered as a quality-tier input if a future spec ties contract quality tier to source method, but not a CDE in this Bronze zone.* |
| 8 | `load_date` | date | false | false | Date the load ran. Identical across all 51 rows. Pipeline freshness metadata only. Not a decision input. Not a personal date. |

---

## Tag List for Data Contract (for @doc-generator to embed)

When `governance/data-contracts/raw-bea-rpp.yaml` is generated, embed the following column-level flags:

```yaml
# Fragment — to be merged by @doc-generator into the raw-bea-rpp.yaml contract
columns:
  - name: geo_fips
    type: string
    required: true
    business_term: BT-RPP-STATE-FIPS  # or the existing State Identifier term, per glossary
    is_cde: true
    cde_rationale: "Primary key and sole join key for every downstream use of this table. ANSI/FIPS external standard. Dedup grain for Bronze->Silver promote. Auto-approved as CDE per domain-context.md BEA RPP section."
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "2-digit zero-padded ANSI/FIPS state code (e.g., '06' for California, '19' for Iowa, '11' for DC)."

  - name: geo_name
    type: string
    required: true
    business_term: BT-RPP-STATE-NAME  # or the existing State Identifier term, per glossary
    is_cde: true
    cde_rationale: "Display label served by the MCP tool response and frontend salary-adjustment UI; fallback identifier when the user/LLM passes a state by name rather than FIPS or abbreviation. Auto-approved as CDE per domain-context.md BEA RPP section."
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "Full human-readable state or jurisdiction name (e.g., 'California', 'Iowa', 'District of Columbia')."

  - name: rpp_all_items
    type: double
    required: true
    business_term: BT-098
    is_cde: true
    cde_rationale: "The entire analytical payload of this table. Every derived field in Silver and Gold is a pure function of this column. Wrong values here mis-state every salary adjustment displayed to any student who selects that state. Auto-approved as CDE per domain-context.md BEA RPP section (cross-reference BT-098)."
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "BEA Regional Price Parity index, All Items line code, national baseline = 100.0. Observed range in current load: [86.9, 110.7]."

  - name: data_year
    type: int
    required: true
    business_term: BT-RPP-DATA-YEAR
    is_cde: true
    cde_rationale: "Provenance-critical temporal dimension. RPP index is re-published annually; mis-labeled vintage silently stales every downstream purchasing-power figure. Governs annual-refresh replacement semantics and distinguishes the 8 spec-verified rows from the 43 estimated placeholder rows in the current load."
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "Year of the RPP estimate. Constant 2024 across all 51 rows in the current load."

  - name: source_url
    type: string
    required: true
    is_cde: false
    cde_rationale: ""
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "Provenance URL (BEA API endpoint) or local cache path. Must NOT persist the BEA UserID API key; store URL template or redact UserID=REDACTED."

  - name: ingested_at
    type: timestamp
    required: true
    is_cde: false
    cde_rationale: ""
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "ETL batch timestamp. Identical across all 51 rows in a single load."

  - name: source_method
    type: string
    required: true
    is_cde: false
    cde_rationale: ""
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "Enum: 'bea_api' (live BEA API call) or 'csv_cache' (fallback to cached CSV). Current load: 100% csv_cache."

  - name: load_date
    type: date
    required: true
    is_cde: false
    cde_rationale: ""
    is_pii: false
    pii_rationale: ""
    description: "Date the load ran. Operational freshness metadata."
```

---

## Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Columns evaluated | 8 |
| Columns flagged CDE | **4** (`geo_fips`, `geo_name`, `rpp_all_items`, `data_year`) |
| Columns flagged PII | **0** |
| Columns not flagged | 4 (`source_url`, `ingested_at`, `source_method`, `load_date` — all pipeline metadata) |
| Regulatory frameworks triggered | None |
| Sensitivity classification | `public` across all 8 columns |

**Downstream reminder:** CDE flags do not propagate. When @cde-tagger runs on `silver-base-bea-rpp` and `gold-regional-price-parities`, it will re-evaluate each derived column (`state_abbr`, `census_region`, `purchasing_power_multiplier`, `cost_tier`, `adjusted_30k/50k/75k/100k`) on its own merits in those zones.
